title: Incorrect dateTime in ODBC
description:
I'm using Virtuoso open-source edition 07.20.3217 , and accessing it through ODBC.
When I run the following query:
SPARQL insert { graph <http://champin.net/2016-06-28-test1> { [] rdfs:label "2016-06-28T10:17:24.567"^^xsd:dateTime } }
and then get it back with
SPARQL select ?o { graph <http://champin.net/2016-06-28-test1> { ?s ?p ?o } }
I get the following invalid timestamp: 2016-06-28 138:17:24.567 (notice the value 138 for hours...).
Note that when I run the same select query in the SPARQL endpoint, I get the correct result, so the data seems to be correctly stored, the problem seems to be in the ODBC interface.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id INT PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMP, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time, description) VALUES (1, '2016-06-28T10:17:24.567'::TIMESTAMP, 'Test event 1');
INSERT INTO test_dates (id, event_time, description) VALUES (2, NULL, 'Test event 2');
SELECT id, event_time, description FROM test_dates WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, event_time FROM test_dates WHERE event_time < '2016-06-29T00:00:00'::TIMESTAMP;
